title: Helloween DIRM
description: Halloween resource pack with renaming items for a private server
body:
The Halloween resource pack for a private server is a lot of hats, bows, cobwebs and complementary elements for this holiday. 
Witch hats, bows and more can be renamed using a carved pumpkin. Candies that are in different colors and sizes can be renamed using cookies.
Candy bags are renamed using bags and web using thread. Have a creepy Halloween friends!
